rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) has no relation to Elec. Code §252.010, which governs transfer of campaign treasurer appointments for candidates seeking a different office.
quote: Sec. 252.010. TRANSFER OF APPOINTMENT. (a) If a candidate who has filed a campaign treasurer appointment decides to seek a different office that would require the appointment to be filed with another authority, a copy of the appointment certified by the authority with whom it was originally filed must be filed with the other authority in addition to the new campaign treasurer appointment.
_note: No conflict exists; the cited election code provision is unrelated to the proposed Tax Code homestead exemption change.
